name: Amotiv Limited
analysis: AOV's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 33% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.4200, stop A$5.9598, target A$8.1776 (3.82:1) — then trail it.
